1127.issue: [W1127] [io-package.json](https://github.com/jpawlowski/ioBroker.residents/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "state" common.states must be number or string

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (scripts/verify-package-contents.mjs). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/jpawlowski/ioBroker.residents/blob/master/io-package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.7.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/jpawlowski/ioBroker.residents/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
